response.original_title: El 24 de septiembre de 1912 en Lima (Día de la toma del poder por Guillermo Billinghurst)
response.overview: It contains: the troops covering the route from the Government Palace to the La Merced church; His Excellency and entourage leaving the Te Deum; the public gathered in Bolívar Square; the announcement committees leaving Congress; the arrival of Mr. Billinghurst; the boisterous appearance of the people of Callao; the Plaza de Armas at six in the afternoon; the public making noisy demonstrations on the city tram cars; the lighting of the Municipal Palace at 11:50 at night.
response.title: El 24 de septiembre de 1912 en Lima (Día de la toma del poder por Guillermo Billinghurst)
